ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neural network architecture used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training and testing */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing other hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment ended */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES architectures ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activation_functions" (
  "activation_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activation function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the activation function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activation function */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the activation function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activation function was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the activation function */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activation_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "random_initialization_methods" (
  "random_initialization_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each random initialization method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the random initialization method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the random initialization method */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the random initialization method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the random initialization method was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the random initialization method */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("random_initialization_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_counts" (
  "node_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node count */,
  "node_count" INTEGER /* Number of nodes in the neural network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node count */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the node count */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node count was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the node count */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_testing_ratios" (
  "training_testing_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training-testing ratio */,
  "ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of training data to testing data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training-testing ratio */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training-testing ratio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training-testing ratio was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the training-testing ratio */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_testing_ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_metrics" (
  "accuracy_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated this accuracy metric */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the neural network */,
  "testing_accuracy" REAL /* Testing accuracy of the neural network */,
  "train_var" REAL /* Variance of training accuracy */,
  "test_var" REAL /* Variance of testing accuracy */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the neural network */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the neural network */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the neural network */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) of the neural network */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value of the neural network */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the neural network was trained for */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_user" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activation_function_experiment" (
  "activation_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activation function */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activation_function_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "random_initialization_method_experiment" (
  "random_initialization_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the random initialization method */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("random_initialization_method_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_count_experiment" (
  "node_count_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node count */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_count_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_testing_ratio_experiment" (
  "training_testing_ratio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training-testing ratio */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_testing_ratio_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made this comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flagged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who flagged the comment */,
  "flagged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_flagged_by FOREIGN KEY ("flagged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neural network architecture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the architecture was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the architecture */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
